specific_question: How many new encryption policies did the cybersecurity specialist at MediConn propose for protecting patient files stored in the virtual consultation system in Q2 2025?
answer: During compliance reviews between April 1 and June 30, 2025, the cybersecurity specialist at MediConn submitted 2 new encryption policy proposals for securing patient file storage within MediConn’s virtual consultation system. These proposals were then forwarded to the IT compliance committee for approval.
dr_question: By Q4 2025, how can MediConn Solutions integrate the HHS Cybersecurity Performance Goals (CPGs) into its virtual healthcare platform to ensure compliance for both internal systems and third-party vendors, while effectively mitigating emerging cyber threats?
